message:
Remove unused DecodingText imports from all page files

After the recent commit that replaced <DecodingText text="..." />
with plain static text in all page hero headings, the import
statements were left behind in 7 files. The only remaining usage
of DecodingText is in components/algorithm-card.tsx.

Also removes two additional dead imports from app/beads/page.tsx:
- BeadHUD (only used inside components/beads/beads-view.tsx, not
  the page itself)
- FrankenGlitch (no longer referenced in the beads page JSX)

Files cleaned:
- app/page.tsx
- app/architecture/page.tsx
- app/beads/page.tsx (DecodingText + BeadHUD + FrankenGlitch)
- app/getting-started/page.tsx
- app/glossary/page.tsx
- app/how-it-was-built/page.tsx
- app/showcase/page.tsx

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
